name: Spicy Cabbage Salad with Chili-Rubbed Flank Steak
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons fish sauce or vegetable oil
2 tablespoons roasted unsalted peanuts, finely chopped
1 fresh chili pepper or more to taste
1/4 cup cracked white or black pepper
2 pounds flank steak or top round
1 red bell pepper, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
Prepare grill.
Whisk together all dressing ingredients in a small bowl; set aside.
Combine chili pepper, cracked pepper, and salt in a second small bowl. Mix well.
Rub both sides of steak with the chili mixture, pressing down into the meat.
Grill steak 6 minutes; turn and grill to desired doneness, 4 to 6 minutes. Remove from grill and set aside.
Combine cabbage, bell pepper, basil, cilantro, and mint in a large serving bowl.
Slice steak across the grain into very thin strips. Cut strips into bite-size pieces; add to cabbage.
Stir dressing; add enough to moisten ingredients. Toss to coat.
